description: bd doctor's Git Hooks check reports hooks as @unknown/0.0.0 and incompatible with Dolt backend, even immediately after running bd hooks install --force. This is a known upstream bug (steveyegge/beads#2244) fixed in commit b96483fc. The fix teaches parseBDHookVersion() and CheckGitHooksDoltCompatibility() to recognize the section-marker hook format. Resolution: upgrade bd past commit b96483fc.
title: bd doctor reports hook incompatibility even after bd hooks install --force

description: Epic: Implement the testing standard defined in specs/testing-standard.md. The codebase currently has zero test coverage, no test infrastructure (bats-core, helpers, fixtures), and two bugs identified during gap analysis (allocate_port broken, spec references wrong variable name). This epic covers: installing bats-core, creating test helpers and fixtures, writing unit tests for all primitives, CLI contract tests for all scripts, e2e placeholders, shellcheck integration, and fixing the two identified bugs. See research/testing-standard/research.md for full gap analysis with 26 gaps identified (2 critical, 3 high, 4 medium, 2 low).
title: Implement Testing Standard
